seoTitle: Dunoon vs Duns Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dunoon and Duns Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dunoon vs Duns Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dunoon and Duns Creek.
heading: Dunoon vs Duns Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dunoon, New South Wales and Duns Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunoon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Duns Creek (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dunoon or Duns Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dunoon has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Duns Creek scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dunoon scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Duns Creek scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dunoon or Duns Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
